sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84779" key="polu/diyos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-διψος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84779.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making very thirsty,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:91" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.91</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
